meaning: n.附属于礼拜堂的小教堂
examples: Do you ever regret leaving the Chantry?
Leliana: Let's just say I had plenty of reasons to join the Chantry, shall we?
The counter-reaction was a rush of piety, exemplified in a wave of church- and chantry-building.
Headteacher of the Chantry School in Martley, Worcestershire, said heads had a statutory obligation to make sure their sites were safe.
In Ipswich, plans to show matches on a big screen in the city's Chantry Park have been cancelled after fears that violence might erupt.
